Taxonomy Kingdom Chromista      (
      1CHROK      ) Phylum Oomycota      (
      1PSDFP      ) Class Oomycetes      (
      1OOMYC      ) Order Peronosporales      (
      1PEROO      ) Family Peronosporaceae      (
      1PEROF      ) Genus Phytophthora      (
      1PHYTG      ) Species Phytophthora infestans      (
      PHYTIN      )

seed.symptoms: Greasy gray-green water-soaked patches on leaves; white sporulation on undersides; rapid brown-black collapse of tissue; firm dark fruit lesions.
seed.causes: Oomycete Phytophthora infestans; same pathogen as potato late blight; spreads explosively in cool, humid conditions.
seed.treatment: Fungicides with metalaxyl, dimethomorph, or mancozeb; destroy infected plants immediately.
seed.prevention: Resistant varieties; destroy infected debris; avoid wetting foliage; early season planting.
